title: Stack Drop
description: Adds a rebindable keybind to drop your entire held stack instantly.
body:
Features:
Fully rebindable "Drop Full Stack" keybind
Shows up in Options → Controls under "Stack Drop"
Works on any server, no server-side install needed
Lightweight, client-side only

How to use:
Install the mod
Go to Options → Controls
Find "Drop Full Stack" under the Stack Drop category
Bind it to any key you want
Press it in game to instantly drop your full held stack!

Requirements:
Minecraft 1.21.11
Fabric Loader
Fabric API
